Notes: Exercise whether an UPDATE that deletes an existing CNAME at a name and adds an A RR at the same name is evaluated against the pre-state or as an ordered sequence within the message.

Steps.Description: Delete alias.campus.edu. CNAME target.campus.edu. and add alias.campus.edu. A 192.0.2.31 in the same UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME still exists after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset was accepted after deleting the CNAME in the same UPDATE.
